hero.title: Tech Lab
hero.description: A personal tech exploration and tools collection. It archives experimental case studies and provides publicly accessible online tools.

tools.title: Online Tools
tools.description: Public online utilities maintained and iterated by tool category.

demo.title: Labs
demo.description: Feasibility studies and interaction exploration, archived by research topics.

demoIndex.title: Labs
demoIndex.description: A collection of feasibility studies and interaction experiments. Each case is isolated for easy archiving and iteration.

contourCompare.title: Contour Comparison
contourCompare.description: Side-by-side comparison of backend Java wcontour smooth isobands vs frontend IDW interpolation with Chaikin smoothing.

hubeiData.title: Geo Data Workshop
hubeiData.description: GeoJSON import/export, attribute editing, random point generation, plus an API script execution test entry.

chinaFull.title: China Boundary Preview
chinaFull.description: Render nationwide province boundaries from 100000_full GeoJSON for future diff and hollowing experiments.

radarFilter.title: Radar Threshold Filter
radarFilter.description: Load radar precipitation image via Mapbox raster layer, filter by color threshold ranges to display different precipitation intensity zones.

webglColorramp.title: WebGL Grayscale Color Ramp
webglColorramp.description: Frontend IDW grid → 1-channel grayscale PNG → GPU fragment shader color ramp with GL_LINEAR bilinear filtering, sub-millisecond response.

toolsIndex.title: Online Tools
toolsIndex.description: Public tools hub. Tools are implemented as isolated modules and aggregated here as entries.

building.title: Toolbox in Progress
building.description: Entries are organized under /tools. New tools will be released as independent routes like /tools/xxx.

webNav.title: Web Navigation
webNav.description: Curated resources and frequently used developer websites
